strengths: Recent OpenZeppelin experience in Web3 security, EVM infrastructure, smart contract audit delivery workflows, and OSS Relayer work

Signer-adjacent production work through AWS KMS and GCP KMS integrations, RPC retry/failover, transaction cost handling, and nonce reliability
Direct work with enterprise users, clients, product teams, infrastructure teams, and auditors
Practical agentic coding tool signal through Claude, Cursor, OpenCode, AI Skills, and OpenAI API proof-of-concept work

eligibility_risks.item: Location fit for Spain-based full remote
eligibility_risks.evidence: JD lists Paris, Berlin, London, Lisbon, New York and says possible full remote, but does not explicitly say Spain is accepted. Zama's official About page says its processes are remote-friendly and people can join from anywhere in the world.

The candidate is non-US based and lacks US work authorization by default. The JD does not require US work authorization; New York is one listed location among European locations and possible full remote.

resume_focus_priority: OpenZeppelin EVM Relayer OSS ownership, signer integrations, transaction reliability, and nonce race fix
TypeScript SDK and developer-tooling evidence, including Defender SDK capabilities and monorepo architecture improvements
Smart contract audit delivery workflows with auditors, clients, enterprise users, and migration support
Technical leadership through co-leading modules, architecture decisions, mentoring, code review, and cross-functional execution
Agentic coding tools and AI-facing developer experience, carefully stated only where supported
Company-specific alignment with Zama SDK, ERC-7984, confidential tokens, and institutional on-chain finance

evidence.bullet: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 12+ years of professional experience building and operating production systems across B2B SaaS, enterprise platforms, marketplaces, and Web3 security.
Professional roles span 2015 to 2026 across Laboratorio de Ideas, Dxpress, Resit SPA, Vitamina Holding, Rappi, Premise, and OpenZeppelin.

company_research_used_for_fit.claim: Zama positions the protocol as confidential onchain finance using FHE to issue, trade, and manage confidential assets on public blockchains.

Zama's SDK documentation describes @zama-fhe/sdk and @zama-fhe/react-sdk as packages for shielding, unshielding, confidential transfers, React hooks, signer adapters, and getting to a confidential transfer quickly.
ERC-7984 is Zama's confidential token standard for encrypted balances, confidential transfers, public verifiability, and programmable compliance.
